album.notesHtml:
Yogurt is a single release in the 2025 catalog with full lyrics now published below.

Left it on the counter warm and slowGotta let it settle gotta let it growThick and creamy white delightTakes all night but baby it's alright

No label no liesJust fresh from your thighsI stir I waitYou set my taste

Call it yoghurt but we knowWe knowWhat drips what slips what makes me glowGlowEvery morning on my trayI eat it fresh I eat it every dayEvery dayProbiotics oh oh ahOh oh ahCan't get this at the store I checkedI checkedFrom your kitchen down my throatThat yoghurt's got me well doneWell done

I eat it every day enjoy it every wayHot or cold thick or oozy yeah I swallowI swallowI eat it every day in bed or on my trayA little on my lips the rest I followFollow
